name: sugi-cmms-system
description: Sugi CMMS foundation with React PWA, Express API, SQLite, and work order MVP.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/shared build && concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/api dev" "pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/shared build && pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/api build && pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @sugi-cmms/web typecheck
